svg.title: GP checkerboard enhancement (PyCBD) pipeline
svg.desc: 5-stage pipeline from upstream detector partial output through iterative GP-guided corner allocation, GP retraining, occluded fill-in and global smoothing, to the augmented corner set with per-corner variance.

text.style: font-size: 12px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; fill: #111827
